title: Ember Road
one_line: Beautiful fantasy hero RPG with map travel, town quests, item progression, grinding, leveling, and automated battles.

platform.notes: Mobile and web can inform readability and controls, but first proof is native PC.

first_slice.name: Town Gate Hunt
first_slice.first_goal: Help the town guard clear a Road Wolf from the North Road.
first_slice.success_state: Quest complete, hero gains XP/gold, one item is acquired or equipped, and the next map lock is visible.
first_slice.blocked_state: Old Mine remains locked until level 2 or the first quest is complete.

pillars: The world feels explorable through towns and map nodes.
Combat is automatic, but preparation and route choice matter.

player_verbs.input: Click the quest NPC or primary quest button in town.
player_verbs.rule: Quest is available if no active first quest exists.
player_verbs.feedback: Quest card opens, objective pins to HUD, North Road marker glows.
player_verbs.blocked: If a quest is already active, show current objective and return path.

player_verbs.rule: Destination must be unlocked and hero must not be in a battle result modal.
player_verbs.feedback: Hero marker moves from town to node; location title and encounter preview update.
player_verbs.blocked: Locked nodes show requirement, not a dead click.

player_verbs.input: Click Fight at the selected encounter node.
player_verbs.rule: Encounter consumes no resource in first slice; combat resolves by combat.json rules.
player_verbs.feedback: Battle overlay animates rounds, HP changes, attack flashes, and result banner.
player_verbs.blocked: If hero HP is too low in later tuning, prompt return/heal before starting.

player_verbs.input: Click Equip or Keep on the reward comparison.
player_verbs.rule: Item must be in inventory and slot-compatible.
player_verbs.feedback: Hero attack value and item slot update immediately.
player_verbs.blocked: Disabled Equip explains slot or requirement.

player_verbs.input: Return to town and click Claim on the quest NPC/card.
player_verbs.feedback: Gold/XP flyouts, quest complete stamp, next locked destination hint.
player_verbs.blocked: If objective incomplete, show remaining step and map shortcut.

resources.sink: later town services and item purchases
equip choice; later sell/craft not in first slice

progression.effect: Unlock Old Mine preview in later slice; first slice may leave it locked with visible requirement.
progression.visible_before_after: Level badge, XP bar fill, map lock requirement.

progression.requirement: Drop from Road Wolf or quest reward.

reference_grounding.reason: The lead named the reference as a taste anchor, but no observed source packet, frame ledger, or current-build mismatch exists yet.

replay_reason: Repeat fights to fill XP, earn gold/items, complete quests, and unlock the next map destination.
non_idle_statement: No away-time rewards or passive prestige loop are assumed. Grinding requires explicit map/quest/encounter choices.
